description_long: This factory building complex consists of multiple rectangular structures arranged within a fenced perimeter, featuring flat roofs and a mix of brick and concrete facades. The site includes several large parking lots with numerous vehicles, and the buildings are interspersed with small landscaped areas containing trees and shrubs. The main factory buildings have wide, industrial-style entrances and loading dock doors, suitable for freight and vehicle access. There are no visible smokestacks, but some rooftops display mechanical installations such as HVAC units or vents. The architectural style is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality, typical of modern industrial facilities. The overall layout suggests a combination of manufacturing, storage, and administrative spaces within a secure, accessible urban environment.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with multiple flat-roofed buildings, large parking lots, and landscaped areas, all enclosed by a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, parking lot, and the front facades of the largest factory buildings, with visible landscaping and access roads.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side and rear buildings are visible, along with additional parking and more green spaces between the structures.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the back of the main factory buildings, the full extent of the parking area, and the arrangement of smaller auxiliary structures.
description_view_3: The front elevation is prominent here, displaying the main parking lot, loading dock doors, and the primary access points to the factory buildings.
